speaker: narrator
text: Tap the text to show or hide reading controls.

speaker: unknown
text: “What?”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyung Young, wide-eyed, looked at the person in front of him.

speaker: unknown
text: “You have been looking for me since this morning, so what is it?”

speaker: narrator
text: Baek Sang looked at Hyun Young, who was puzzled, and said,

speaker: hyun young
text: “I want to join the finance hall.”

speaker: hyun young
text: “… in this situation?”

speaker: hyun young
text: “Well, this might not be the right time to say it. But it is what my heart wants me to do, so I thoUght that moving forward as quickly as possible would be better.”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young thoUght that this was a bit absurd but also felt a little curious too.

speaker: narrator
text: It was about the time they would look for some Baek disciples to transfer over to the finance hall.

speaker: narrator
text: It was also a good time for them to learn the ropes of the finance hall.

speaker: narrator
text: It was hard to bring this up, but Mount Hua had started developing like a bamboo sprout recently, and the money kept flowing.

speaker: narrator
text: It had become difficult to handle all their finances with their existing manpower.

speaker: narrator
text: So shouldn’t he be happy if people were willing to transfer of their own volition?

speaker: hyun young
text: “But you suddenly want to join?”

speaker: hyun young
text: “I have been thinking about it, and…”

speaker: hyun young
text: “I cannot beat the other disciples with my current skills.”

speaker: hyun young
text: “You aren’t old enoUgh to think like that.”

speaker: narrator
text: At Hyun Young’s words, Baek Sang shook his head,

speaker: hyun young
text: “No Elder! I know myself very well. Even if they are below me now, they will soon become better than me in the future.”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young’s expression twisted,

speaker: hyun young
text: “So, you are saying that you want to enter our Finance Hall because you cannot see results? Because this is the more comfortable way?”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young was shocked at Baek Sang’s resolute words.

speaker: narrator
text: His heart, which was a little angry, calmed down to listen.

speaker: hyun young
text: “Elder! I am a sahyung and sasuk for them. Even if I have less talent, I don’t want to be pushed around by them!”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young liked this.

speaker: hyun young
text: “After thinking deeply, I realized one thing!”

speaker: hyun young
text: “The true power of Mount Hua comes from the Finance hall!”

speaker: narrator
text: A light shone in the eyes of Baek Sang.

speaker: baek sang
text: “What is causing Mount Hua to regain its glory?! Martial arts? Sure, talent? Sure. But more importantly, it is because Mount Hua has money now!”

speaker: baek sang
text: “Right! Right! You understand!”

speaker: baek sang
text: “Money! If we have money, we have power! I’d rather be a man who counts money and wears out his fingers than a man who rolls in sweat. Please accept me, elder! No, Finance Hall Head!”

speaker: narrator
text: Isn’t a snobby and vile attitude the best kind for the Finance Hall?

speaker: narrator
text: ‘Actually, I did want Jo Gul.’ Jo Gul was from a merchant family, so he thoUght that Jo Gul would have eyes for management.

speaker: narrator
text: But suddenly, he had seemingly become dyed drunk under Chung Myung and began to use his body more than his head.

speaker: narrator
text: But listening to the words of Baek Sang, it seemed he would be more than talented enoUgh to lead the next Finance Hall!

speaker: chung myung
text: “I wonder. Right, did you think of this yourself?”

speaker: narrator
text: Baek Sang scratched his head,

speaker: baek sang
text: “I thoUght about it while talking with Chung Myung last night.”

speaker: baek sang
text: “Huh!?With Chung Myung?”

speaker: narrator
text: A warm smile settled on the face of Hyun Young.

speaker: narrator
text: You knew how to send talented people to the finance hall.

speaker: narrator
text: It was clear that Chung Myung had recognized this child’s talent and had sent them his way.

speaker: narrator
text: If not, how could a person make up their mind in just one night?

speaker: chung myung
text: “Are you sure about this?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Then I will inform Sect Leader and accept you as a member.”

speaker: narrator
text: Baek Sang said with soft eyes,

speaker: baek sang
text: “I have no intention of forgetting my role as a warrior just because I belong to the Finance Hall. It will not be easy, but I will try to balance myself as much as possible.”

speaker: baek sang
text: “It will not be an easy thing, but if you have the will to do it, I will not stop you. As for your training, I will not be micromanaging it. Keep that in mind.”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young smiled brightly.

speaker: hyun young
text: “People come and go, just as money ebbs and flows,”

speaker: narrator
text: said the Finance Hall Head.

speaker: narrator
text: In the midst of all this, he would need people to watch all of this.

speaker: hyun young
text: “Then set this aside for a bit.”

speaker: hyun young
text: “This isn’t something that can be done right away. Now that things have happened like this, you will need some time to learn what happens inside the hall.”

speaker: narrator
text: Baek Sang nodded his head.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘He is trying to show me how it all works.’ He didn’t know what he would be shown, but whatever was shown would be worthwhile.

speaker: narrator
text: So, he would have to remember what he saw for life.

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young raised his voice and sat down, Immediately the door opened, and Wei Lishan entered.

speaker: hyun young
text: “I heard that Elder was looking for me.”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young looked at him and smiled, Wei Lishan sat down with a burdened expression.

speaker: narrator
text: At first, the hospitality was nice, but as he kept getting it, he began to feel weird.

speaker: hyun young
text: “Isn’t this too much?”

speaker: narrator
text: Hun Young laUghed at Wei Lishan’s question,

speaker: hyun young
text: “Listen carefully, Huayoung Gate Leader,”

speaker: hyun young
text: “You came here as the gate leader of Mount Hua right?”

speaker: hyun young
text: “Does it belong to Mount Hua or not?”

speaker: narrator
text: Wei Lishan thoUght for a moment.

speaker: narrator
text: It was because he didn’t know the intention behind this question, so he was a bit hesitant,

speaker: hyun young
text: “Of course, we belong to Mount Hua…”

speaker: hyun young
text: “… is what I think, but the main sect and the gates were distinctly separated. Even if not that, shouldn’t we be referred to as a sub-sect instead these slang words for family?”

speaker: hyun young
text: “Right. Right. You know your thing.”

speaker: narrator
text: There was a little relief on Wei Lishan’s face, who had managed to give the answer Hyun Young wanted.

speaker: hyun young
text: “Then why do you ask such a thing?”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young took off the smile on his face.

speaker: narrator
text: At first, he looked kind, but now his two eyes were smiling slyly like they were up to something.

speaker: hyun young
text: “Aren’t you thinking of making money?”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young rubbed his fingers together, It was at that moment Wei Lishan realized something terrible was happening.

speaker: narrator
text: The day of the finals came quickly.

speaker: narrator
text: As if the silence from the previous two days had been a lie, as soon as the sun broke the horizon, people began flocking in.

speaker: hyun young
text: “Today is the finals!”

speaker: hyun young
text: “Until now, it has just been light entertainment! Now comes the real fights!”

speaker: hyun young
text: “Right! True! How can we go back after watching just the preliminary rounds!”

speaker: narrator
text: Everyone was looking excited.

speaker: narrator
text: A true battle wouldn’t look much different from today.

speaker: narrator
text: AlthoUgh it was said that the prestigious sects had sent their strongest students, finally the wheat had been separated from the chaff.

speaker: narrator
text: If such strong people were put against one another, people were bound to show up and watch.

speaker: narrator
text: How many of them would one day become masters?

speaker: narrator
text: The finals would be held, and this was where even famous people would get filtered out.

speaker: narrator
text: Wasn’t it known that those who gained fame here are the same people who would lead the world tomorrow?

speaker: narrator
text: As a result, the crowd was much larger than before.

speaker: hyun young
text: “What is with the people in the back? Are they selling something?”

speaker: hyun young
text: “Since there are so many people here, food has to be sold. Chung Myung! There are sugar candies here!”

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung looked around.

speaker: narrator
text: Behind the crowd, food vendors were selling their refreshments.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Huh? It seems a lot of people flocked over.”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong smiled at this,

speaker: hyun jong
text: “hehe.So many came.”

speaker: hyun jong
text: “It seems like I am getting hungry from this. Sect Leader, would you like to have something?”

speaker: hyun jong
text: “No. I will have to go up to the podium soon, so I don’t have time to eat.”

speaker: narrator
text: He looked at the place with a smile and tilted his head like he had found something.

speaker: hyun jong
text: “But it doesn’t look like they are selling anything, so why are people gathered over there?”

speaker: narrator
text: At Hyun Jong’s words, Hyun Young narrowed his eyes.

speaker: hyun young
text: “Red and blue… table? Um… maybe a bet?”

speaker: hyun young
text: “Doesn’t it look that way?”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong’s jaw was dangled open,

speaker: narrator
text: On the holy grounds of Shaolin?

speaker: hyun jong
text: “hehe.Does this mean Shaolin allowed it? No, even if they didn’t allow it, the man has the courage to do so. I have lived long enoUgh to see this.”

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Haha. Right. I thoUght only our kids would make trouble.”

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Right. I hope they aren’t… uh…?”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong tilted his head.

speaker: narrator
text: There was something strange about the merchant who was bringing the people to the back…

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Haha.Same here. Doesn’t he look like the Huayoung Gate’s leader?”

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Right. Too similar…”

speaker: narrator
text: So similar they looked the same…

speaker: hyun jong
text: “No, why is Wei Lishan there…”

speaker: narrator
text: Wei Lishan opened the fan in his hand to half-cover his face and raised his voice,

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Come on up! You have to bet before the start! Before the start! You cannot bet once it starts! Those who have bet money take a token! Tokens without seals will not be exchanged, so never lose them!”

speaker: narrator
text: Seal?

speaker: narrator
text: Token?

speaker: narrator
text: Exchange?

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong, shocked, mumbled,

speaker: hyun jong
text: “… looks like he has opened a gambling table.”

speaker: hyun jong
text: “You mean the gate leader just opened a stall?”

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Ah no, that crazy man?”

speaker: narrator
text: A guy gambling in Shaolin who was from Mount Hua!

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong’s face trembled and kept alternating between red and white over and over again.

speaker: narrator
text: And when he came to his senses, he looked around, Huayoung Gate Leader!

speaker: narrator
text: The Wei Lishan whom he knew wasn’t the kind of person to do such things.

speaker: narrator
text: There had to be someone else who had made him do it!

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Chung Myung! Where is that guy?! Chung Myung!”

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung, who was buried in his sahyungs, poked his head out and hurried over to Hyun Jong.

speaker: chung myung
text: “You bastard! What have you done!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “That! Wasn’t it you… you asked for that gambling table to be set up?”

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung looked to where Wei Lishan was,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Wow, that man isn’t normal either. Why didn’t I think of this?”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong was confused as Chung Myung really didn’t seem to know about this.

speaker: narrator
text: It wasn’t Chung Myung… Then he heard a low coUgh from behind, and Hyun Jong turned his head like lightning.

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young, his beloved sajae, was smiling with a bashful smile.

speaker: narrator
text: In a voice that had lost its life, Hyun Jong mumbled,

speaker: hyun young
text: “What are you saying?”

speaker: hyun young
text: “What are you talking about?”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young shrugged his shoulders.

speaker: hyun young
text: “What Wei Lishan is doing is his own thing. Even if I am an elder, I cannot interfere in the workings of the sub-sect.”

speaker: hyun young
text: “… so, the gambling? In Shaolin?”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young looked around as he approached Hyun Jong and wrapped his arms around the man’s shoulder, and pulled him in,

speaker: hyun young
text: “I will give him half the earnings.”

speaker: hyun young
text: “The people here have more money than expected. The people who started that over there also agreed to give us half the money they earned. There was nothing saying not to gamble here. I went and figured it out.”

speaker: hyun young
text: “Huhuhu.Don’t worry Sect Leader. We can make a lot of money…”

speaker: hyun young
text: “Yah! You–full crazy idiot!”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong, who was trembling in anger, kicked Hyun Young on the ass.

speaker: narrator
text: And screamed,

speaker: hyun young
text: “I told Chung Myung to not make trouble and now an elder is the one who is doing it?! Is this what an elder in the sect does!”

speaker: hyun young
text: “Shhh! Lower your voice!”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young came back and said it wasn’t a huge deal.

speaker: hyun young
text: “This is what Huayoung did. Mount Hua has nothing to do with this.”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong grabbed his neck at the pain coursing up it.

speaker: narrator
text: This damned scoundrel!

speaker: narrator
text: Now even the elders were doing crazy things!

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Y-You bastard! You have no pride!”

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Where is the pride in Mount Hua? And does pride make us money? We need money! Money!”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Young smiled and pulled Chung Myung to himself,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Don’t worry. This guy will save the pride and face of Mount Hua. Isn’t that right Chung Myung?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Yes. But can I bet too?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Yes. Will you bet on you winning?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Right! Let’s see the big money we make!hahah!”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong closed his eyes as he looked at the two of them smiling in a similar way.

speaker: narrator
text: ‘To overrule their sect leader.

speaker: narrator
text: This is a sect which has no perfect answer!’

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong’s life seemed to be getting better and better each day on Mount Hua… but it also seemed like his life was getting equally more difficult!

speaker: narrator
text: Return of the Mount Hua Sect
